author: Samuel Vaillant
subject: feat(index): compute local uiState (#3997)
body:
* feat(types): create types for getWidgetState/getWidgetSearchParameters arguments

* feat(index): compute local uiState on state changes

* feat(index): expose getWidgetState

* test(index): indexes -> indices

* feat(index): remove listeners on Helper

* test(index): omit -> omitted

Co-Authored-By: François Chalifour <francoischalifour@users.noreply.github.com>

* feat(index): push empty indices in uiState
